name: Jeanne Clery Disclosure of Campus Security Policy and Campus Crime Statistics Act
description: Requires disclosure of campus crime statistics and security policies

requirements.title: Annual Security Report
requirements.description: Institution must publish an annual security report containing crime statistics for the previous three years

requirements.title: Timely Warnings
requirements.description: Institution must issue timely warnings for Clery Act crimes that pose a serious or ongoing threat

requirements.title: Daily Crime Log
requirements.description: Institution must maintain a daily crime log open for public inspection

requirements.title: Emergency Response Procedures
requirements.description: Institution must have documented emergency response and evacuation procedures
